hero.collaboration: A Collaborative Program between Clarus and Norrsken

objective.headline: Product Is No Longer Moat
objective.subtitle: This is a 4-week execution sprint for East Africa-focused startups that already have traction.
objective.velocityIntro: In an AI-native world, product advantage erodes fast, what compounds now is velocity:

weeks.title: Positioning and ICP Clarity
weeks.subtitle: Sharpen your customer definition and remove narrative confusion.

weeks.title: AI-Native Shipping
weeks.subtitle: Build and operate faster using AI tools.

weeks.title: Distribution and Revenue Systems
weeks.subtitle: Design and launch a measurable GTM experiment.

items.label: Who This Is For
items.title: Positioning and ICP Clarity
items.subtitle: Sharpen your customer definition and remove narrative confusion.

rows.label: You should apply if:
items: You have real traction (revenue, active users, pilots, meaningful pipeline)
You feel your GTM is messy, unclear, or slow
You are ready to commit 5–7 hours per week
You want to launch a real GTM experiment in 30 days

rows.label: Do not apply if:
items: You are still validating an idea

items.label: What You'll Walk Away With
items.title: By the end of 4 weeks,
items.subtitle: Closed-door Activation Showcase to invited investors and operators.

rows.label: Deliverables:
items: A validated GTM experiment with real data

cta.heading: Apply Now
cta.subheading: Applications are open for a limited time.
cta.body: If your GTM feels unclear, slow, or noisy and you're ready to fix it, apply.

items.question: Is this only for Norrsken portfolio companies?
items.answer: No. It is open to East Africa-focused startups with traction.

items.question: Is there funding attached?
items.answer: No direct funding. This is a GTM execution program, not an investment vehicle.

items.question: Is this free?
items.answer: There is a participation fee. Details will be shared upon application review.

items.question: Is this intense?
items.answer: It's focused, not exhausting. Expect 4–6 hours per week of structured sprints and reviews.

items.question: Is this a grant or funding program?
items.answer: No. Scale Velocity Lab is an execution-focused GTM acceleration program.

items.question: Is this a traditional accelerator?
items.answer: No. There's no equity taken, no cohort house, and no pitch day pressure.

items.question: Is this a pitch competition or networking event?
items.answer: Neither. It's a structured execution sprint focused on real GTM progress.
